board cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists member cascade Hibernate: create table application ( application_id bigint generated by default as identity, board_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), member_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), status enum ('ACCEPTED','CANCELED','PENDING','REJECTED') not null, primary key (application_id) ) Hibernate: create table board ( board_id bigint generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6), member_id bigint not null, recruitment_end_date timestamp(6) not null, recruitment_start_date timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), title varchar(255) not null, content clob not null, status enum ('CLOSED','RECRUITING') not null, primary key (board_id) ) Hibernate: create table member ( created_at timestamp(6), member_id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','USER') not null, primary key (member_id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists application add constraint FK8058ugb4s2bcm5lnsevjuoj6r foreign key (board_id) references board Hibernate: alter table if exists application add constraint FKg29uoyxw2bkpcsrxt99j4yfw4 foreign key (member_id) references member Hibernate: alter table if exists board add constraint FKsds8ox89wwf6aihinar49rmfy
